headings: (c) All of that property located at 789 Some Street, Bryan, TX 77801
text: - (d) THE EQUAL OPPORTUNITY CLAUSE, NON-DISCRIMINATION AND WAGE CLAUSES, if any, and Executive Orders relating thereto as referred to in the General Conditions or the Supplementary General Conditions of the Contractor's Agreement with Owner are herewith made part of this Subcontract. Subcontractor specifically agrees to abide by and comply with the terms and intent of said clauses and provisions. Violation thereof shall be good cause for termination of this agreement.
